title: Springy Ukrainian Onion Nigiri
description: A refreshing twist on traditional nigiri, featuring the sweetness of spring onions and a hint of Ukrainian culture.
instructions: Trim the ends of the yellow onions and soak them in water for 30 minutes to remove bitterness.
Drain the onions and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Cut the onions into thin slices and separate them into individual rings.
Prepare the sushi rice according to the package instructions.
Mix the cooked sushi rice with rice vinegar and sesame oil in a large bowl.
Form the sushi rice into small oval shapes, about 1 inch in length.
Brush the tops of the nigiri with a small amount of sesame oil.
Garnish the nigiri with a sprig of fresh dill.
Serve the springy Ukrainian onion nigiri immediately, or store them in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
